  ],

}

  "criteria": [
    {"name": "Correctness", "score": 35, "max_score": 35, "comment": "Output order is preserved via `j.idx`. `workers <= 0` normalised on line `if workers <= 0 { workers = 1 }`. Worker count capped at `len(inputs)`. Empty input returns an empty slice early. 35/35 band — every spec item is visible in the code."},
    {"name": "Concurrency Safety", "score": 35, "max_score": 35, "comment": "Each goroutine writes to a unique `out[j.idx]` (no shared write target). `wg.Add(1)` before goroutine starts, `defer wg.Done()` inside; producer closes `jobs` after sending; `wg.Wait()` blocks until all workers exit. 35/35 band."},
    {"name": "Efficiency", "score": 15, "max_score": 15, "comment": "Workers consume from a shared channel; indexed writes are race-free so no mutex. Goroutine count is `min(workers, len(inputs))`. 15/15 band."},

  ],
  "suggestions": [],

  "complexity": {"time": "O(n / workers) wall", "space": "O(workers + n)"},
  "confidence": 1.0
}
</RESULT>
